coverage_goals.functional: Legacy alias: coverage_goals.function and coverage_goals.cycle must both close.
coverage_goals.evidence: Tool-instrumented structural metrics are optional unless an explicit SSOT metric goal with matching tool evidence is added.
coverage_goals.scenario: All SSOT scenarios pass with executable cocotb/pyuvm checkers and FL-vs-RTL scoreboard evidence
